test_brief: Create a dashboard for a sales manager who wants to monitor monthly revenue, sales by region, top products, conversion rate, and customer churn. The data contains date, region, product category, revenue, number of leads, conversions, and churn status.

prediction.context_summary: The sales manager needs to track monthly revenue, sales by region, top products, conversion rate, and customer churn.

design_rationales.name: High Visibility
design_rationales.description: Ensure that all relevant metrics are clearly visible.

design_rationales.name: User-Friendly
design_rationales.description: Make it easy for users to understand and interact with the data.

design_rationales.name: Real-Time Insights
design_rationales.description: Provide real-time updates on key performance indicators.

design_rationales.name: Scalability
design_rationales.description: Design the dashboard to scale as the business grows.
